planName: Structural Revision Bridge v2.1 Final Master Plan

blockers.summary: git push to origin is blocked by missing or invalid GitHub credentials in local environment
blockers.resolution: push succeeds when GH_TOKEN is unset for git command and gh keyring credential is used

blockers.summary: Stage 10 Word transport proof remains blocked because the shipping export path now returns project-bound manifest-binding evidence and persists a local ExportManifest artifact for the bounded current-scene case, but it still does not bind transport envelope data into the DOCX package and has no current-repo Word smoke artifact
evidence: handleExportDocxMin plus runDocxMinExport now enrich the shipping export snapshot and return revisionBridge manifest-binding evidence for project-bound current-scene export
shipping export path now persists a local ExportManifest artifact under the project revision_bridge section
buildRevisionBridgeTransportEnvelope is referenced only in revision bridge contract tests
docxMinBuilder writes only Content_Types rels and word/document.xml
DOCX_CLOSURE_EVIDENCE_V1 is static runtime wiring verification only
v1 hardening donor report explicitly says full external Word or Google round-trip manual smoke was not executed

blockers.summary: C14C cannot start as a write contour because current repo canon and on-disk artifact truth do not define a non-deletable local storage slot for ExportManifest artifacts
evidence: PROJECT_SUBFOLDERS define roman mindmap print materials reference trash and backups only
ONDISK_ARTIFACTS lists project manifest, scene documents, backups, recovery and cache but no export manifest artifact kind or path pattern
current shipping path returns revisionBridge manifest-binding evidence only and does not yet persist any local ExportManifest artifact
blockers.resolution: owner approved a dedicated project revision_bridge folder as the canonical non-deletable local storage slot for ExportManifest artifacts

factCheckResults.claim: continuation exists and work is not from zero
autocycle now tracks full master-plan contour queue rather than single-contour loop
resolvedState and acceptedState are evaluated as orthogonal comment decision dimensions
anchor disagreement reasons are explicitly aggregated and surfaced as deterministic summary evidence
import seam preview is bound into registry-only record without manuscript mutation path
ApplyTxn and decisionSet are now bound to deterministic contract-only apply-plan preview buckets by scope sceneIds
structural operations now expose deterministic manual-review preview with blast radius and affected comment counts while keeping canApply false

current shipping DOCX export entrypoint is not transport-ready for Stage 10 because its runtime snapshot lacks revision bridge manifest prerequisites and the DOCX builder does not emit transport metadata parts

shipping DOCX export path now enriches project-bound current-scene exports with revision bridge manifest prerequisites and returns manifest-binding evidence without persisting an ExportManifest artifact or changing DOCX package shape
current repo truth does not define a canonical non-deletable storage slot for ExportManifest artifacts

shipping DOCX export path now persists a canonical local ExportManifest artifact under the dedicated project revision_bridge section and returns deterministic artifact metadata without widening the DOCX package shape
